parameters.query:
INSERT INTO Integration_Log (ExecutionId, Status, Message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.executionId }}',
  'ERROR',
  'Node: {{ $json.errorNode }} | {{ $json.errorMessage }}'
);

parameters.subject: =🚨 Metal Rates Integration (PROD) - ERROR - Execution {{$execution.id}}
parameters.html:
=

🚨 Metal Rates - Production Failure

Workflow{{$json.workflowName}}
Execution ID{{$json.executionId}}
Mode{{$json.mode}}
Timestamp{{$json.timestamp}}
Failed Node{{$json.errorNode}}
Error Type{{$json.errorType}}

Error Message

{{$json.errorMessage}}

Stack Trace

{{$json.errorStack}}

Raw Error Dump (debug)

{{$json.rawDump}}

Action Required: Check SQL connectivity, XML API availability, and integration logs immediately.
